finalVerdicts.message: Grandma will complain but still eat it. And ask for the recipe. Secretly.
Not traditional. Not wrong. Just... dangerous.
The family group chat has started arguing. Screenshots are circulating.
You cooked with confidence. Accuracy remains under investigation.

highTradition.message: The ancestors are proud. Very proud.

highCreativity.message: You're the reason Nigerian food is going global. Or giving people heartburn. Both.

highEfficiency.message: Speed master! Your guests didn't even finish asking 'Is the food ready?'

highExecution.message: Technique so clean, even the pot is proud of itself.
